summary:
What is the setup? The instance is configured behind a private network using Gitlab Omnibus configuration, and the sub-domain is provisioned by an Apache configuration on another server. So the SSL certificates are tied to the Apache server’s IP address. The certificates are provided by letsencrypt.
What is the Problem? On running the certbot renew command, the SSL certificates for the subdomain usually work in a seamless manner. However, all CI/CD jobs using the container registry start failing.
title: Renewing Self-hosted Gitlab Instance SSL Keys
